perturbation.original_text: We shall keep a record of the written Information furnished to us and of the location of such Information. All copies of the Information, along with our notes on, summaries and compilations of, or excepts from, the Information, except for that portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be returned to you immediately upon your request.
perturbation.changed_text: We shall keep a record of the written Information furnished to us, but are not obligated to document its location. All copies of the Information, along with our notes on, summaries and compilations of, or excepts from, the Information, except for that portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be returned to you immediately upon your request.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states 'we shall keep a record of the written information furnished to us and of the location of such information,' implying a mandatory tracking process. The modified text contradicts this by stating 'we shall keep a record of the written information furnished to us, but are not obligated to document its location.' This creates ambiguity about Crane Co.'s responsibility to track where the information is being stored.
perturbation.contradicted_text: We shall keep a record of the written Information furnished to us, but are not obligated to document its location. All copies of the Information, along with our notes on, summaries and compilations of, or excepts from, the Information, except for that portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be returned to you immediately upon your request. That portion of the Information which consists of analyses, compilations, forecasts, studies or other documents prepared by us, our agents, representatives or employees, will be held by us and kept confidential and subject to the terms of this Agreement, or destroyed upon your request, and any oral Information will continue to be subject to the terms of this Agreement. Such destruction will be confirmed in writing to you by us and the person or persons who prepared such documents.
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates keeping records of both the information furnished and its location. The changed text removes the obligation to document the location of the information, while the contradicted text (which is the same as the changed text in this case) also states that they are not obligated to document the location. This directly contradicts the initial requirement established in the original text, creating an in-text contradiction because it is now unclear whether the location of information must be tracked, making the original obligation ambiguous and unenforceable, adhering to the definition of 'Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: The term Information shall not include such portions of the Information which (i) are or become generally available to the public other than as a result of a disclosure by us, our agents, representatives or employees, or (ii) become available to us on a non-confidential basis from a source (other than you or your agents) which is not prohibited from disclosing such information to us by a legal, contractual or fiduciary obligation to you or (iii) information which we have developed independently through conducting our own competitive business.
perturbation.changed_text: The term Information shall not include such portions of the Information which (i) are or become generally available to the public other than as a direct result of a deliberate disclosure initiated by us, our agents, representatives or employees, or (ii) become available to us on a non-confidential basis from any source regardless of whether the source is prohibited from disclosing such information to us by a legal, contractual or fiduciary obligation to you or (iii) information which we have developed independently through conducting our own competitive business.
perturbation.explanation: In clause (i), the modified text adds 'direct result of a deliberate disclosure initiated by us,' changing the definition to exclude indirect or accidental disclosures from being considered an exception. In clause (ii), the text removes the requirement that the source be 'not prohibited' from disclosing the information, meaning even illegally obtained data is excluded from the definition of 'Information'. These changes weaken the definition of 'Information' compared to the original.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Information will be kept confidential, however, disclosure is permitted to our legal counsel without your prior written consent, to assess the legality of the transaction, but shall not be used by us, our agents, representatives or employees, other than in connection with the transaction described above. Moreover, we agree to reveal the Information only to our agents, representatives and employees who need to know the Information for the purpose of evaluating the transaction described above, who are informed by us of the confidential nature of the Information and who shall agree in writing to act in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement. We shall be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by our agents, representatives or employees.
perturbation.justification: The changed text significantly weakens the definition of 'Information' by (i) limiting excluded disclosures to 'deliberate' ones and (ii) removing the requirement that the source of non-confidential information be 'not prohibited' from disclosing it. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which requires that the Information be kept confidential and that agents, representatives, and employees agree in writing to act in accordance with the terms of the agreement. Because even illegally obtained data or accidentally disclosed data by the company is now excluded from the definition of 'Information' it means that the 'Information' to be kept confidential is narrowed in scope. Therefore the change creates a direct and strong contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: We acknowledge that remedies at law may be inadequate to protect against breach of this Agreement and we hereby agree in advance to the granting of injunctive relief in your favor without proof of actual damages.
perturbation.changed_text: We acknowledge that remedies at law may be inadequate to protect against breach of this Agreement, however, injunctive relief shall only be granted upon demonstration of significant financial harm to the Business.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause grants injunctive relief without proof of actual damages, implying immediate protection. The modified clause requires demonstration of significant financial harm, contradicting the ease with which injunctive relief could be obtained originally, thus requiring proof to proceed. This introduces a higher burden of proof, potentially delaying or preventing injunctive relief.
perturbation.contradicted_text: We acknowledge that remedies at law may be inadequate to protect against breach of this Agreement, however, injunctive relief shall only be granted upon demonstration of significant financial harm to the Business. Very truly yours, CRANE CO. By: /s/ N.S. Evans
perturbation.justification: The original text allows for injunctive relief without proof of actual damages, while the changed text requires demonstration of significant financial harm. Since the contradicted text is identical to the changed text, this creates a direct contradiction with the original intent of granting injunctive relief without needing to prove damages, thus creating a strong in-text contradiction.
